name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Value Pawn & Jewelry Plant City, Florida — Value Pawn & Jewelry in Miami, FL offers pawn loans, gold buying, and pre-owned merchandise at 25–70% off ret...
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry at 736 NW 183rd Street in Miami, FL is a member of the EZPAWN family of stores, one of the largest pawn retail chains in the United States. The Miami location serves a broad urban consumer base and positions itself as a community-oriented alternative for quick cash needs, retail bargains, and jewelry liquidation. The store carries the EZPAWN operational playbook but markets under the Value Pawn & Jewelry brand in the South Florida market.

The store offers a full suite of pawn-industry services. Core offerings include collateral-based pawn loans — customers bring items of value, receive a cash loan, and reclaim items upon repayment including fees. The store also purchases gold and diamond jewelry outright, using in-house testing to determine karat and weight. Retail sales feature pre-owned brand-name electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming equipment, musical gear, handbags, and sneakers at claimed discounts of 25–70% off new retail prices. Additional services include layaway (10% down, monthly payments), a 'Take Today' buy-now-pay-later option via third-party partners, and an online shop with daily inventory updates. The store also lists Firearms and Auto Loans as specialty service categories at this location.

What sets this location apart from independent pawn shops is the EZPAWN infrastructure behind it. Customers have access to the EZ+ Rewards program, which tracks pawn activity, layaway balances, and rewards points through an app or online portal, and supports online payments for loan extensions. An Instant Quote tool on the website lets customers estimate item value before visiting. Jewelry buyers can enroll in a Jewelry VIP Program offering guaranteed loan amounts, free stone replacement, and free cleaning on either a one-year or lifetime basis. Product Protection Plans are also available for electronics and A/V purchases.

Honestly, Value Pawn & Jewelry fills a legitimate niche for consumers who need fast, collateral-based cash without a credit check or bank account. Pawn loans are not cheap — fees are not disclosed on the website and customers should ask a team member for the full cost of borrowing before proceeding. The 'Take Today' financing option involves third-party lenders and credit eligibility requirements that are not detailed on the site. This is a transactional, no-frills financial service, not a low-cost borrowing alternative — it is best approached as a last-resort cash option or a place to shop discounted pre-owned goods rather than a primary financial tool.
address: 109 W Prosser Dr, Plant City, FL 33563

company_info.headquarters: 109 W Prosser Dr, Plant City, FL 33563

pros: EZ+ Rewards program lets customers manage pawns, layaways, and points digitally — including online payments for extensions
Instant Quote tool online lets customers estimate item value before making the trip
Operates 7 days a week including Sundays (12–5pm), with extended weekday hours until 7pm
Online shop updated daily with thousands of pre-owned items available for browsing before visiting
Pre-owned merchandise priced at 25–70% off new retail — covers electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming, and more
Professional in-store gold and diamond testing ensures transparent, weight/karat-accurate pricing for sellers
Jewelry VIP Program offers guaranteed loan values and lifetime protection benefits for jewelry buyers
cons: Pawn loan fees and terms are not disclosed on the website — customers must ask in-store, making cost comparison difficult before visiting
Part of a large corporate chain (EZPAWN), not a locally owned operator — some consumers prefer independent pawn shops with more negotiation flexibility
Take Today financing involves unspecified third-party lenders with unstated credit requirements and repayment terms
Firearms are sold at this location, which may deter some customers
All merchandise is pre-owned with no brand owner affiliation — condition and warranty coverage vary per item
best_for: Miami-area residents who need fast cash without a credit check and have electronics, jewelry, or tools to use as collateral
Bargain shoppers looking for brand-name electronics, gaming gear, or jewelry at 25–70% below retail
Gold and jewelry sellers who want a professional in-store appraisal with same-day payment
Consumers who prefer managing pawn loans digitally via the EZ+ app rather than handling everything in person
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best for unbanked or credit-constrained Miami residents who need immediate cash against personal property, or deal-seekers shopping pre-owned brand-name goods at steep discounts. The main caveat is cost transparency: pawn loan fees are not published online, so consumers should get the full fee schedule in writing before pledging items.
services: Pawn loans (collateral-based, no credit check required)
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with in-store metal testing
Pre-owned retail merchandise sales (electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming, sneakers, handbags)
Online shop with daily new inventory arrivals
Take Today buy-now-pay-later via third-party financing partners
EZ+ Rewards program with online pawn and layaway management
Instant Quote tool for electronics valuation online
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan amounts, stone replacement, cleaning)
Product Protection Plans for electronics and A/V equipment
